Vessel registry - EDA

2024-11-08

library(tidyverse)
v <- 
  readxl::read_excel("data-raw/HREIDAR_Islensk_skip.xlsx", guess_max = 2e5) |> 
  janitor::clean_names() |> 
  rename(vid = nr,
         vessel = nafn,
         uid = stadur,
         uno = numer,
         year = ar,
         fate = endalok)

Data pattern

  • Looks like for lower vessels numbers we have not the full “annual” history back in time
  • For some vessels with higher numbers than ~1000 there is a general tendency that first year of entry is a function of veesel number
    • I guess this is because when a new vessel comes in it get the next available number
    • There are however some exceptions. There may be legitimate reason for this or it could indicate data entry error.
v |> 
  filter(between(vid, 1, 3700)) |> 
  filter(between(year, 1900, 2050)) |> 
  ggplot() +
  theme_grey(base_size = 14) +
  geom_tile(aes(year, vid)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Vessel id") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1900, 2050, by = 20)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 10000, by = 100))

Let’s calculate the number of vessels by uid (staður):

v |> 
  filter(between(vid, 1000, 3700),
         between(year, 1963, 2025)) |> 
  count(year, uid) |> 
  ggplot(aes(year, n)) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ uid,
             scales = "free_y")

Vessel history

  • For now just looking at change in name and uid
  • Could easily be expanded to include more variables (loa, brt, …)
# Get unique history
h <- 
  v |> 
  filter(between(vid, 1, 9995)) |> 
  filter(between(year, 1900, 2050)) |>
  select(vid,
         vessel,
         uid,
         uno,
         year,
         fate) |> 
  mutate(vid = as.integer(vid)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(vid)) |> 
  arrange(vid, year) |> 
  group_by(vid) |> 
  mutate(.rid = 1:n(),
         .last = case_when(.rid == max(.rid) ~ TRUE,
                           .default = FALSE),
         v = dplyr::consecutive_id(vessel, uid, uno, .last),
         .before = vid) |> 
  # put vessel fate on last record
  fill(fate) |> 
  mutate(fate = case_when(.rid == max(.rid) ~ fate,
                          .default = NA)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  distinct(vid, vessel, uid, uno, .last, .keep_all = TRUE) |> 
  select(-.last)
h
## # A tibble: 23,145 × 8
##     .rid     v   vid vessel   uid   uno    year fate       
##    <int> <int> <int> <chr>    <chr> <chr> <dbl> <chr>      
##  1     1     1     1 Akurey   RE    95     1947 <NA>       
##  2     6     2     1 Akurey   AK    77     1952 <NA>       
##  3    20     3     1 Akurey   AK    77     1966 Sold abroad
##  4     1     1     2 Akurey   SF    52     1964 <NA>       
##  5    23     2     2 Akurey   GK    160    1986 <NA>       
##  6    24     3     2 Akurey   KE    121    1987 <NA>       
##  7    26     4     2 Akurey   SF    122    1989 <NA>       
##  8    29     5     2 Akurey   SF    122    1992 Ruined     
##  9     1     1     3 Akraborg EA    50     1947 <NA>       
## 10    33     2     3 Akraborg EA    50     1979 Ruined     
## # ℹ 23,135 more rows

List of vessels with no recorded fate:

h |> 
  group_by(vid) |> 
  filter(.rid == max(.rid),
         is.na(fate))
## # A tibble: 16 × 8
## # Groups:   vid [16]
##     .rid     v   vid vessel                      uid   uno    year fate 
##    <int> <int> <int> <chr>                       <chr> <chr> <dbl> <chr>
##  1    67     4   295 Ásgeir                      RE    281    1966 <NA> 
##  2    75     6   447 Garðar                      BA    74     1974 <NA> 
##  3     8     3  2853 <NA>                        KÓ    <NA>   2021 <NA> 
##  4     1     1  2989 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
##  5     1     1  2993 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
##  6     1     1  2994 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
##  7     1     1  2996 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
##  8     1     1  3001 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
##  9     1     1  3006 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
## 10     1     1  3007 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
## 11     1     1  3008 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
## 12     1     1  3009 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
## 13     1     1  3010 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
## 14     1     1  3014 ÖÖ Númer virðist ekki notað <NA>  <NA>   2021 <NA> 
## 15   104     3  5863 Síldin                      SH    650    2003 <NA> 
## 16     9     3  7765 <NA>                        RE    <NA>   2021 <NA>

… not bad
